subject: [CPS] Make a void change for investigation
commit_message:
[CPS] Make a void change for investigation

This void change is to investigate job errors for
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/117099

There is no intent to merge this change.

Issue-ID: CPS-7
Signed-off-by: Bruno Sakoto <bruno.sakoto@bell.ca>
Change-Id: I21b3b9ae68f58f3526faaecc74f87d9270bdc594
